cases.description: Implementation plan request produces structured sequential plan
cases.prompt: write an implementation plan for adding Stripe payment integration
expectations: Reads relevant existing code before writing the plan
Produces numbered steps in sequential order
Each step identifies specific files to create or modify
Plan is complete enough to execute without clarification

cases.description: Complex feature breakdown produces phased implementation plan
cases.prompt: plan how to migrate the authentication system from JWT to OAuth2
expectations: Identifies the scope of changes needed
Organizes steps to maintain system functionality during migration
Each step is atomic and verifiable
Includes rollback considerations
Activates the plan-writer skill
Reads relevant codebase context before writing
Produces an ordered, concrete implementation plan

cases.description: Requirements document produces an actionable implementation plan
cases.prompt: I have a spec for the user dashboard. write a plan to implement it
expectations: Reads the spec or asks where it is
Translates requirements into concrete implementation steps
Orders steps by dependency (infrastructure before features)

cases.description: Executing an existing plan should trigger plan-executor, not plan-writer
cases.prompt: execute the implementation plan we just wrote
expectations: Does NOT invoke the plan-writer skill
Does NOT write a new plan
Executes the existing plan steps

cases.description: Design exploration should trigger brainstorming, not plan-writer
cases.prompt: what's the best way to design the notification system? I see several options
expectations: Does NOT invoke the plan-writer skill
Does NOT produce sequential implementation steps
Explores design options with trade-offs
